subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou hast manifested Thyself unto the righteous through the lights of Beauty and hast lifted the veils from their eyes, that they might behold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد تجلیت علی الابرار بانوار الجمال و کشفت عن اعینهم الاستار فشاهدوا
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
